overall.description: A winged character flies through a narrow, torch-lit rocky canyon at night in a fantasy video game. The camera follows from behind in a smooth third-person perspective as the character navigates between steep rock walls illuminated by warm fires against a dark blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow torch-lit canyon passage with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: flying steadily forward through the canyon with wings fully extended, maintaining altitude between the rock walls

entered.detail: steep dark rock wall with rough texture rising vertically on the left side
steep dark rock wall with rough texture rising vertically on the right side
warm orange fires mounted on the canyon walls providing the primary light source
dark blue night sky visible as a narrow strip above the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a winged character flying through a narrow, dark canyon at night. Steep rock walls flank both sides, illuminated by warm torch fires that cast flickering light against the cool blue darkness. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character maintains a steady course through the enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved section of canyon requiring navigation turn

events.description: character banks left to navigate a bend in the canyon corridor

agents.ego_description: banking left with wings tilted to navigate a curve in the canyon while maintaining forward momentum

segments.scene_description: As the canyon curves, the character banks left to follow the passage. The left canyon wall swings into the center of the frame while the right wall recedes into the distance. The torch lights continue to line the walls, illuminating the turn as the character navigates the bend in the rocky corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, torch-lit canyon that curves through a dark nocturnal landscape. It begins with a winged character flying steadily through an enclosed passage, where steep rock walls are illuminated by flickering warm fires against a cool blue sky. As the character maintains this course, the camera follows smoothly from behind, capturing the contrast between the torchlight and the surrounding darkness. The scene then shifts as the character banks left to follow a bend in the rocky corridor, causing the left wall to swing into the center of the frame while the right wall recedes into the distance. This fluid motion continues through the turn, with the lining of torches guiding the way through the winding canyon.
